name: Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease and flour twelve 2 1/4-inch muffin cups, making sure to grease the tops of the tins between the cups thoroughly.
3. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. In a medium-sized bowl, beat the butter until fluffy. Add sugar and beat until well blended.
5. Beat in the eggs, then add vanilla extract. Mix about half of the flour mixture into the butter mixture.
6. Gradually stir in the remaining flour mixture.
7. Stir in 2 cups of blueberries (fresh or frozen). If desired, add another 1/2 cup of mashed berries.
8. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling them to the top.
9. Sprinkle with nutmeg sugar and bake for 25-30 minutes until golden brown.
10. Allow the muffins to cool at least 30 minutes in the pan before removing. Warm for about 7 minutes at 350°F (175°C) before serving.
11. Makes 1 dozen muffins.
